features: HARDWORKING SKINCARE: O'Keeffe's Lip Repair's highly effective formula relieves, hydrates, and helps repair extremely dry lips to leave them feeling soft, smooth, and healthy all day long.

ALL DAY MOISTURE: Lip Repair provides instant relief and all-day moisture in just one use. Our ingredients help lock moisture into the skin to keep it hydrated and create a protective barrier on the skin’s surface.
PROTECTIVE LAYER: Creates a protective flexible barrier to help protect from the environment. With instant relief and all-day moisture, our lip balm will even protect while you eat and drink.
7 MOISTURISING AGENTS – Where other lip balms only include 1 or 2 types of moisturising ingredients, we include 7, ensuring that you get instant relief to heal dry, cracked lips.

GUARANTEED RELIEF: We know you’ll love our products, but if you are dissatisfied for any reason, we will refund your purchase with a voucher of equivalent value (terms and conditions apply). Visit our website to make a claim and for further information
description: Product Description O'Keeffe's Lip Repair’s highly effective formula relieves, hydrates and helps repair extremely dry lips to leave them feeling soft, smooth and healthy all day long. Offering long-lasting hydration for up to 24 hours, O'Keeffe's Lip Repair is clinically proven to work with just one application. With seven moisturisers and conditioners, O’Keeffe’s Lip Repair continues to work throughout eating and drinking. For best results, apply O’Keeffe’s Lip Repair to lips in the morning and enjoy intense hydration and protection all day long. Available in Unscented, Cooling Relief or SPF. Ingredients Beeswax, Dimethicone, Petrolatum, Hydrogenated Polydecene, Phenyl Trimethicone, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet ALMOND) Oil, Trimethylpentanediol/ Adipic Acid/Glycerin Crosspolymer, Butyrospermum Parkii BUTTER, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Polysilicone-11, Ethylene/Propylene/ Styrene Copolymer, Sodium Saccharin, Butylene/Ethylene/ Styrene Copolymer, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-Di-T-Butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate Directions Apply O'Keeffe's Lip Repair to lips in the morning for all-day hydration and protection. Safety Warning May cause irritation. Stop using if irritation occurs. Keep away from excessive heat and direct sun. Contains potential allergens. See more
